name: Airik Crawford
bio: Eric Boyd Crawford Jr., professionally known as Airik Crawford, founded AAEC in March 2022. Raised on the West Side of Chicago, he approaches visual storytelling as an artist first, with a background in painting, design, composition, and creative theory from Knox College.
note: photo is Airik's real portrait (from PHOTOGRAPHY/airik.jpg), added 2026-07-18. relatedWork is an optional array of {"title": ..., "href": ...} pairs pointing at /work/<slug>.html pages; the About page modal renders a "Related Work" list automatically once this is populated. Per client request (2026-07-21 revision), only Airik is listed on the team page for now — other team members can be re-added here once Airik wants them shown again.
